clean_rungs: PRD ↔ Code (all major features documented and implemented or properly stubbed)
Architecture ↔ PRD (architecture correctly derives from PRD requirements)
Dependencies Registry (docs/dependencies.md accurately documents all shipped and planned dependencies with proper Buy/DIY justification)
Code Comments ↔ Docs (canonical doc back-links present throughout codebase; 81 PRD §X references found)
Package Layout (shipped packages/{core,db,ui} matches documented partial layout; planned packages/{auth,data,services,integrations} properly marked as planned)

findings.title: Stale documentation references to removed docs/plan.md
findings.description: README.md and docs/architecture.md contain stale references to docs/plan.md, which was intentionally removed in PR #202 (commit 609419f52c13bda6b9a9f511201226bb8cd521dc). Planning state is now tracked exclusively in GitHub Issues (#1 = Plan). The references break navigation and confuse users about where the implementation plan lives.

architecture.text: > Derived from `docs/prd.md`, `docs/plan.md`, and the per-rule research under `docs/architecture/rule-*.md`
Plan's `docs/plan.md` package list (`packages/{core,db,ui}`) matches the shipped set...

removal.reason: Conflicts with Plan issue tracking in GitHub; planning state now in Issues

acceptance_criteria: README.md either removes the Plan link or updates it to reference GitHub Issues (e.g., 'Implementation Plan: See GitHub Issues')
docs/architecture.md line 4 updated to remove reference to docs/plan.md; update header to clarify architecture derives from PRD and per-rule research
docs/architecture.md line 123 reworded to clarify planning state is tracked in GitHub Issues, not a docs file
docs/architecture.md line 184 updated to clarify the Plan reference means GitHub Issues tracking
test_plan: Verify README.md links do not lead to 404 on docs/plan.md
Check that any user navigating from README can find the actual Plan (GitHub Issues or a new Docs link pointing to the right place)
Confirm docs/architecture.md does not reference a non-existent file

audit_notes.drift_detection_method: Compared PRD §5–§9 against shipped code and docs; checked recent merges since c1db6433 for new features and drift; audited dependencies.md against package.json files; verified canonical doc back-links in code; confirmed all six role surfaces present
audit_notes.rung_1_prd_vs_code: CLEAN — PRD describes features 5.1–5.12 (placement, attribution, calculation, approval, invoicing, guarantee, close, reconciliation, portal, onboarding, partner, AI arbitration/simulation). Code implements through 5.11 with 5.12 properly stubbed (dispute-arbitration.ts, simulations.ts, claude-api-client.ts all marked DORMANT_BY_DESIGN with issue references #186, #187, #188).
audit_notes.rung_2_architecture_vs_prd: CLEAN — Architecture.md correctly derives from PRD; _(planned)_ tags accurately mark incomplete work (keyVersion prefix, requireScope helper, BIP-39 recovery, merge queue, ledger replay, image signing, DP on analytics, M-of-N, worker NetworkPolicy enforcement). All shipped items match code state.
audit_notes.rung_3_plan_vs_architecture: CLEAN (with caveat) — GitHub Issues now serve as Plan; recent merges (#251 dependencies.md, #248 architecture refresh, #245 sidebar, #234 placement ledger, #226 case management, #224 design, #221 Tailwind reskin) all have canonical PRD §X back-links and are properly reflected in architecture.md. Caveat: README.md and architecture.md still reference the removed docs/plan.md file.
audit_notes.rung_4_code_comments: CLEAN — 81 PRD §X back-links found in code; all six role surfaces have canonical doc headers (producer/finance/manager/executive/hr/partner directories present); DORMANT_BY_DESIGN annotations on arbitration scaffolds; claude-api-client.ts properly stubbed with issue references.
audit_notes.recent_changes_audit: 12 commits since last garden pass (c1db6433). Highlights: dependencies.md created (resolves #240, fulfills ARCH-C-005); architecture.md updated for Tailwind v4 and Atlas system; customer/candidate entity picker feature merged (#252); sidebar nav per design system (#245); phantom back-links cleaned (#237). All changes have proper commit messages and canonical doc references.
audit_notes.dependencies_audit: docs/dependencies.md created 2026-06-16, comprehensively documents all shipped and planned deps with Buy/DIY justification and blueprint rule traceability. Verified against package.json files across monorepo: postgres, @simplewebauthn/*, react, react-dom, tailwindcss 4, @tailwindcss/vite, @fontsource-variable/*, vitest, playwright, vite, typescript, eslint, prettier, @types/*, ajv, croner all present. Matches architecture.md §3 assertions (ARCH-C-005/C-013, IMPL-ARCH-023).
audit_notes.package_layout_audit: Shipped layout matches architecture.md: packages/{core,db,ui}, apps/{web,server,worker}. Planned layout (packages/{auth,data,services,integrations}) properly marked **_(planned)_** in architecture.md §5.2 and §6. No surprise undocumented packages found.
audit_notes.next_audit_trigger: When issues #186 (Dispute Arbitration), #187 (Producer Simulation), or #188 (Arbitration/Simulation Scout) land, re-audit the arbitration-simulation.md doc against real implementation; verify claude-api-client.ts moves from STUB to real API calls; check if digital twin infrastructure materializes for simulation feature.
